data.title: Farcaster founder: We will cooperate with projects that want to provide airdrops to users, and the first airdrop will be carried out next week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Farcaster founder Dan Romero said that Farcaster will cooperate with developers/projects that want to provide airdrops to users. After joining, users can perform the required actions (using the framework, participating in channels, etc.) and establish a good user reputation to obtain airdrops in the future. Ultimately, developers can decide the target users (the data is permissionless), and the first airdrop will be carried out next week. Dan Romero added that it should be made clear that the airdrop comes from the framework built by the ecosystem developers (not Farcaster).

16. The U.S. PP1 monthly rate in February was 0%, expected to be 0.3%, and the previous value was revised from 0.4% to 0.6%, the smallest increase since July 2024 17. Bitcoin staking platform Solv raised $10 million for its Bitcoin reserve issuance
18. The number of initial jobless claims in the United States for the week ending March 8 was 220,000, expected to be 22.5 10,000 people, the previous value was revised to 222,000 people 19. Jupiter Lianchuang disclosed that it is carrying out the third iteration of smart slippage "RTSE'
20. Jupiter launched the community verification system Smart CT Likes, supporting "likes" to increase Solana ecological tokens

22. Coinbase Chief Legal Officer: Vermont regulators withdraw the lawsuit against Coinbase's pledge service
23. ZKsync announced the suspension of the incentive plan lgnite, responding to the bear market with a more conservative spending attitude
24. The Ethereum mainnet Pectra upgrade may be implemented as early as April 25, depending on the status of the new testnet Hoodi

data.title: Viewpoint: The current situation of ETH is similar to that in 2019. The Fed needs to change its policy before the ETH/BTC exchange rate can bottom out and rebound.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Into The Cryptoverse founder Benjamin Cowen said that the current situation of ETH is similar to that in 2019, and changes in the Fed's monetary policy may be needed to make the ETH/BTC exchange rate bottom out and rebound.
In addition, the price of ETH fell below its support level in 2019, just before the Fed ended its quantitative tightening policy. People feel that it is very difficult to make money in this cycle because the monetary policy of this cycle has not changed. In the previous cycle, the market witnessed a shift in monetary policy a year before the halving. At this stage, it is a year after the halving, but the quantitative tightening policy has not changed. The Fed has only slightly reduced its scale and slowed down its pace, but it has never really stopped.

data.title: Ethereum mainnet Pectra upgrade may be implemented as early as April 25, depending on the status of the new testnet Hoodi
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Tim Beiko, head of protocol support at the Ethereum Foundation, updated the latest information about the Pectra upgrade on X.
1) A new long-term testnet, Hoodi, will be launched on March 17, and the testnet will perform the Pectra upgrade test on March 26;
2) After Hoodi successfully performs the Pectra upgrade test, the mainnet upgrade time will be decided, which is expected to be at least 30 days after the test upgrade (April 25 or later).
3) The Fusaka plan will be implemented simultaneously, with the deadline for proposing EIPs being March 24 and the tentative freeze date for the upgrade scope being April 10.

data.title: Potential Impact of Federal Reserve Policy on ETH/BTC Exchange Rate
data.description: According to Odaily, Benjamin Cowen, founder of Into The Cryptoverse, has drawn parallels between the current situation of Ethereum (ETH) and the conditions in 2019. He suggests that a shift in the Federal Reserve's monetary policy might be necessary for the ETH/BTC exchange rate to reach a bottom and rebound. In 2019, ETH's price fell below its support level coinciding with the end of the Federal Reserve's quantitative tightening policy. During that cycle, market participants found it challenging to profit due to the unchanged monetary policy. In the previous cycle, a change in monetary policy was observed a year before the halving event. Currently, we are a year post-halving, yet the quantitative tightening policy remains largely unchanged. The Federal Reserve has only slightly reduced its scale and slowed its pace, but has not fully halted the policy.

data.title: Vermont follows SEC’s lead, drops staking legal action against Coinbase
data.description:
US state Vermont has dropped its “show cause order” against crypto exchange Coinbase for allegedly offering unregistered securities to users through a staking service.Vermont’s Department of Financial Regulation said in a March 13 order that in light of the US Securities and Exchange Commission tossing out its case on Feb. 28, it would follow suit and rescind its action against Coinbase...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/vermont-dismisses-staking-lawsuit-against-coinbase?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: ZKsync announces suspension of Ignite incentive program to cope with the bear market with a more conservative spending attitude
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News ZKsync officially announced that it will cancel the second season of the incentive program Ignite and will gradually terminate the program by closing the rewards for the 6th period of the first season from March 17.
ZKsync explained that the market is currently in a bear market environment. Like other ecosystems, ZKsync decided to take a more conservative approach to spending in the medium and short term to cope with changing market conditions.
All remaining rewards will be distributed as planned before Monday, March 17, 2025. After the distribution is completed, no new incentives or rewards are planned.

data.title: Microsoft to Integrate AI into Xbox With Copilot for Game Assistance
data.description:
Microsoft’s AI Copilot is launching on Xbox, positioning it as a way to help gamers with gameplay tips, updates, and more.
source: https://decrypt.co/309968/ai-comes-to-xbox-microsofts-copilot-to-help-gamers-improve-and-manage-games

data.title: The 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid went long on ETH at 25x this morning and closed the position after making a profit of $1.18 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of chain data analyst Yu Jin, the 50x leveraged whale on Hyperliquid opened a 25x long position on ETH on Hyperliquid again 5 hours ago, and closed the position 1 hour ago, making a profit of 1.18 million.
The address transferred 4.03 million USDC to Hyperliquid as margin at 4 am Beijing time, and opened 50,000 ETH (about 93 million US dollars) at a price of 1,856 US dollars with 25x leverage. It closed the position at an average price of 1,880 US dollars an hour and a half ago (7 am), and finally earned 1.18 million US dollars.
